subcodes.title: Address to the friends at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-03-04
subcodes.first_line: You are most welcome. I have been sick for the last few days but I am always pleased to meet the friends. I beg from the favors of God to illumine each one
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcending the material condition
